title: Opening for Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? CEAT Tyres in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CEAT Tyres:
CEAT Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
